name: Yangzhou Yangjie Electronic Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Yangzhou Yangjie Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. designs and produces semiconductor products worldwide. It offers semiconductor chips, diodes, bridge rectifiers, and power modules used in lighting, power supply, customer electronics, computer and peripheral equipment, electronic instruments and meters, communication, industrial and automatic control, automotive electronics, and other fields. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Yangzhou, China.
